title: pb-migrate project configuration
description: Schema for pb-migrate.json. The file holds project structure only — the bots map and per-bot settings. Credentials (PB_APP_ID, PB_USER_KEY, PB_HOST, per-bot PB_BOT_<NAME>_KEY) live entirely in a project-local .env managed by `pb-migrate config`.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL. IDEs use this for autocomplete and validation.

bots.description: Map of bot name to per-bot configuration. Bot names must be alphanumeric (Pandorabots constraint).

directory.description: Local directory containing the bot's AIML / set / map / substitution / pdefaults / properties files. Resolved relative to pb-migrate.json's location when relative.

propertiesUpload.description: How `.properties` files are uploaded. additive (default): PUT only — Pandorabots upserts and keys not in the local file are preserved on the server, allowing dashboard edits to coexist with pb-migrate. full: DELETE the remote properties file first, then PUT — local is authoritative and any keys not present locally are removed from the server.

alters.description: Persistent file-body overrides. Map of canonical file name to override path. The override file's body is uploaded under the canonical name on every push, and its kind is inferred from the override path's extension. Designed for debug-session probes (categories that dump predicates, simulate state, etc.) that should re-apply automatically while a session is active and be wiped with `alter:reset` when done. Manage via the alter:list / alter:set / alter:unset / alter:reset commands.

additionalProperties.description: Path to the override file. Relative paths are resolved against pb-migrate.json's directory.
